title_tag: Ngor Surf House in Senegal | Surf Camp Stay
meta_description: Stay at Ngor Surf House in Senegal near Dakar's best waves. Comfortable rooms, surf atmosphere and easy access to Ngor Island surf spots.
hero_subtitle: A relaxed surf stay in Ngor, close to Dakar's most consistent waves and the laid-back rhythm of Senegal's coast.
intro: A five-minute pirogue ride from the Dakar mainland, Ngor Surf House sits on the island where The Endless Summer was filmed. More than a place to stay, it’s the home base for surfers, travellers and ocean lovers from around the world — with world-class waves right on your doorstep.

sections.h2: Stay Close to the Best Surf Spots in Ngor
sections.content: Right next to a city of millions, yet Ngor Island feels empty by evening — just the sound of the ocean and the glow of Dakar’s lights across the water. Ngor Surf House puts you in a prime location for surfing, with quick boat access to the island’s legendary breaks and guided surf sessions at the best spots of the day.
bullets: Quick pirogue access to Ngor Right and Ngor Left
Daily surf guiding based on live conditions and forecast

sections.content: Rooms are cleaned and beds made every day — guests regularly rate it the cleanest surf house on the island. Many rooms offer a panoramic view of the Atlantic and the legendary Ngor Right sunset. Designed for solo travellers, couples and groups, the surf house combines comfort with the intimate, community spirit that international press has praised.
bullets: Private and shared rooms with daily cleaning
Sea views, communal spaces, pool and terrace

sections.content: From monkfish brochettes at the local fish shacks to café touba — the pepper-spiced coffee that gets you revved up for the morning session — Ngor is as much about the culture as the waves. African beats drift from Dakar’s rooftops at night, and the island’s fishermen share stories of surfers riding these waves since the 1960s.
bullets: Authentic Senegalese cuisine — breakfast and dinner included
Music, culture and warm Senegalese teranga

cta_heading: Book Your Stay at Ngor Surf House
cta_text: Rooms are cleaned and beds made every day — so you can focus on surfing. Message us on WhatsApp; we reply within 24h.
og_title: Ngor Surf House in Senegal | Stay Near Dakar Surf
og_description: Discover Ngor Surf House, a comfortable surf stay in Senegal near Dakar's best waves and Ngor Island.
